info.title: École Platform API
info.description:
EdTech SaaS platform API for K-12 schools in Morocco.

## Domains
- **IAM** — Authentication, authorization, invitations, recovery, 2FA
- **ERP** — Classes, enrollments, teacher assignments, attendance
- **LMS** — Courses, assignments, submissions, results, content, activities, assessments
- **Billing** — Invoices and payments
- **COM** — Notifications, consents, parent feed
- **AI** — Writing assistance, recommendations, KPIs

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a `Bearer` access token in the `Authorization` header.
Tokens are obtained via `POST /auth/login`.

get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns service status and version. Used by Docker health checks
and monitoring systems (Pack F2).

post.description:
Authenticate user and create a session.

Returns access token in response body.
Sets refresh token as HttpOnly/Secure/SameSite=Lax cookie.
Sets CSRF token as non-HttpOnly cookie (for double-submit pattern).

Refresh the access token using a valid refresh token from the HttpOnly cookie.

Requires X-CSRF-Token header matching the double-submit cookie value.
Implements token rotation: old refresh token invalidated, new one issued.

Revoke the user's session and clear authentication cookies.

Idempotent: calling logout on an already-revoked session returns 200.

get.description:
Return the authenticated user's profile with permissions and memberships.

This endpoint is the frontend's source of truth for RBAC UI gating.

200.description: User profile with permissions and memberships

get.description:
List the authenticated user's active sessions with device info.

Returns sessions with: session_id, source, user_agent, ip_address,
device_name, created_at, last_active.

200.description: List of active sessions with device info

delete.description:
Revoke a specific session by ID.

Users can revoke their own sessions. ADM can revoke any session in the school.
Invalidates the refresh token and clears the session from Redis.

post.description:
Change the authenticated user's password.

Requires current password verification. Enforces password policy on new password.
Revokes all other active sessions (keeps current session).

Generate a new TOTP secret and QR code provisioning URI.

Returns the secret and URI for the authenticator app.
2FA is not yet active — call /auth/2fa/verify-setup with a valid code to activate.

Verify first TOTP code to activate 2FA.

Returns 10 single-use backup codes (shown once, store securely).
Disable 2FA. Requires a valid TOTP code or backup code.

Verify TOTP code during login flow.

Called after login returns requires_2fa=true.
Accepts temp_token + TOTP code (or backup code) and returns full tokens.
Verify email address via OTP sent during invite consumption.

Create an invitation code for onboarding new users.

Returns the plaintext code (shown once, never stored).

Consume an invitation code to join a school with the specified role.

Idempotent: same code + same user = returns existing membership.

Soft-revoke an invitation code.

Idempotent: revoking an already-revoked code is a no-op.

Request account recovery. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.

If user exists: creates recovery request and generates OTP (logged in dev).
If user doesn't exist: returns success anyway.

200.description: Recovery request ID (always 200, no email enumeration)

post.description:
Verify recovery OTP. Transitions status: pending -> verified.

Lockout after 5 failed attempts (30-minute lock).

Reset user's password. Requires status=verified.

Revokes all active sessions for the user (force re-login).
State machine: pending -> verified -> reset (no backward transitions).

get.description:
Get class details by ID.

Full security pipeline:
1. AuthN — verified by get_current_user (via requires_permission)
2. RBAC — requires PERM-ERP:class:read
3. ABAC — school boundary (404 for other school's classes)
4. ABAC — teacher assignment (TCH only sees assigned classes)

200.description: Class with capacity, level, academic year

post.description:
Enroll a student in a class.

Validates:
- Student exists and is in the same school
- Class exists and is in the same school
- Period is active
- INV-ERP-CLASS-ACTIVE: one active enrollment per student per period (409)

Idempotent: re-enrolling same student in same class returns existing enrollment.

Assign a teacher to a class for a period.

Validates:
1. Teacher exists and is in the same school
2. Class exists and is in the same school
3. Period exists and is in the same school
4. No duplicate assignment (idempotent if same tuple exists)

Create an attendance session with records for a class.

Validates:
1. Class exists and is in the same school
2. Teacher is assigned to the class (ABAC)
3. Period is active
4. No duplicate session for same class/date/slot (409)
5. Creates attendance records for each student

Submit an absence justification for a student.

Validates:
1. Attendance record exists and is in the same school
2. Student is absent/late (only those can be justified)
3. Parent-child ownership (ABAC)
4. No duplicate justification for same record (idempotent)

Review an absence justification (approve or reject).

Validates:
1. Justification exists and is in the same school
2. Justification is still pending
3. If rejecting, rejection_reason is required
4. Updates justification status + creates review record

Create a course for a class.

Validates:
1. Class exists and is in the same school
2. Teacher is assigned to the class (ABAC)
3. Creates course

get.description:
List courses, optionally filtered by class.

TCH: only sees courses for assigned classes.

post.description:
Create an assignment for a course.

Validates:
1. Course exists and is in the same school
2. Teacher owns the course
3. Creates assignment

get.description: List assignments, optionally filtered by course.

post.description:
Create a submission for an assignment.

Validates:
1. Assignment exists
2. Course is in the same school
3. INV-LMS-SUBMISSION: one active submission per student per assignment (idempotent)

Grade a student submission.

Validates:
1. Submission exists
2. Assignment is in teacher's course (teacher owns the course)
3. Submission must be in 'submitted' status
4. Score <= assignment total_points
5. Creates grade, updates submission status to 'graded'

get.description:
List graded results for a student.

STD: sees own results (student_id ignored, uses auth.user_id).
PAR: must specify student_id, which must be a linked child.

200.description: Paginated list of grades and results

get.description:
List published content items.

Filters by content_type, level_band, language.
Shows school-specific + platform-wide content (school_id IS NULL).

Get a content item by ID.

Only published items visible. School boundary or platform-wide.

post.description:
Update student progress on a content item.

Upsert: creates or updates progress record.
Unique per (student_id, content_item_id).

get.description:
List available activities.

Shows school-specific + platform-wide activities.

post.description:
Start a new activity session.

Validates:
1. Activity exists (school or platform-wide)
2. Creates session with incremented attempt_no

Complete an activity session with optional score.

Validates:
1. Session exists and belongs to the student
2. Session is in 'started' status
3. Updates status to 'completed' and sets score

Create a formal assessment for a class.

Validates:
1. Class exists and is in the same school
2. TCH: must be assigned to the class (ABAC)

get.description: List assessments. Optionally filtered by class_id and status.

post.description: Publish an assessment (change status from draft to published).

Submit a result for an assessment (student self-report or auto-graded).

Validates:
1. Assessment exists and is published
2. No duplicate result for same student+assessment (idempotent)

get.description:
List invoices.

PAR: sees own invoices only.
ADM: sees all invoices for the school.
Get invoice details by ID.

post.description:
Initiate a payment attempt for an invoice.

Validates:
1. Invoice exists, is in same school, belongs to the parent
2. Invoice is in pending status
3. Idempotency via idempotency_key (returns existing if same key)

get.description: Get payment attempt status.

post.description:
Handle a webhook event from a payment provider.

INV-BIL-WEBHOOK: duplicate provider_event_id = no-op (idempotent).

Flow:
1. Check for duplicate provider_event_id
2. Find matching payment attempt (optional)
3. Update payment attempt status if found
4. Update invoice status if payment is finalized
5. Store webhook event

get.description:
List notifications.

PAR: sees own notifications only (parent_id = user_id).
TCH/ADM: sees all school notifications.

List consent preferences.

PAR: sees own consents only.
ADM: sees all school consents.

put.description:
Update a consent preference.

PAR: can only update own consents.
ADM: can update any consent in the school.

get.description:
List parent feed items.

PAR only — sees their own feed items.
Optionally filtered by student_id.
Ordered by created_at descending (newest first).

post.description:
Submit text for AI-assisted writing feedback.

Guardrails (G3):
  - Input sanitized for PII (POL-G3-001)
  - Opt-out checked (POL-G3-002)
  - Output validated (POL-G3-003)
  - Audit trail recorded

Update AI personalization opt-out preference.

Parents can opt out of AI personalization for their children.
Per G3.3: POST /ai/preferences/opt-out is contractual in OpenAPI.
Idempotent — upserts the preference.

get.description:
Get personalized learning recommendations.

Guardrails:
  - Opt-out checked (POL-G3-002): returns empty if opted out
  - Reason code mandatory on each recommendation (G3)

Get computed KPIs for the school (G1 catalog).

Returns KPI-G1-001 through KPI-G1-006 for the specified period.
ADM, DIR, TCH roles can access.

Get the analytics event schema registry.

Returns all known events with their schema versions and property whitelists.
Used for CI drift detection (S-146).

opt_out.title: Opt Out
opt_out.description: True to opt out, False to opt back in

target_user_id.title: Target User Id
target_user_id.description: Child user ID (parent opting out for child). Null = self.

AIOptOutRequest.title: AIOptOutRequest
AIOptOutRequest.description: POST /ai/preferences/opt-out — parent opts out of AI personalization.

role_target.title: Role Target
role_target.description: Role code for the invited user (e.g. TCH, PAR, STD)
